text:
Nankul (ナンクル, Nankuru) is an ancient language. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 33, Chapter 346 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

After beating Curly in an ancient language contest, Ging suggested Nankul for the topic of the second round, to which the latter refused. 

Trivia

Intertextuality and References

The word "Nankuru" could be taken from "Nankurunaisa" meaning "Don't worry, be happy!" in the Okinawan Japanese.
